content: # Drop this file into any AI-powered IDE as project context
# Compatible with: Cursor, Windsurf, Zed, VS Code + Copilot, Warp, Antigravity, etc.
# Save as: .cursorrules / .windsurfrules / CONTEXT.md / paste into AI chat
Multi-domain digital business ecosystem built on Whop (whop.com). 24 domains, each with a branded landing page routing to Whop checkout popups. Revenue flows through Whop Payments Network.

720.chat=#5865F2, amp.vote=#6c63ff, artchat.art=#e17055, chatfans.fans=#fd79a8, decisioncall.com=#00b894, eneu.org=#00cec9, epic.cab=#e84393, goodreadr.com=#6c5ce7, iconoclash.dev=#00b0ff, mbo.bio=#ffeaa7, nextwavenetwork.com=#0984e3, paylicious.com=#55efc4, quoteparty.com=#fab1a0, splitcite.com=#74b9ff, summerjobswap.com=#fdcb6e, tag.vote=#00b894, yo.life=#a29bfe, yocloud.com=#636e72, yoservice.com=#fdcb6e
LAUNCH20=20% Creator Monthly 3mo, EARLYBIRD=$10 off Business 1mo, ANNUAL30=30% Annual 1 cycle, COMEBACK=25% all paid 2mo (churned only), SUMMER25=25% SJS Pro 3mo, HIRE50=15% SJS Employer 2mo
- versions/ dir holds zip generations: v{MAJOR}.{MINOR}.{PATCH}_{YYYY-MM-DD}.zip
- MAJOR=breaking layout changes, MINOR=new features/domains, PATCH=copy/color/bugfix
- Always zip BEFORE deploying. Keep last 10 for rollback.
1. Never modify checkout URLs without updating the Whop session
2. Never remove popup checkout pattern — keeps users on-domain
3. Prices must match Whop plan prices exactly
4. Brand color must match domain hex from table above
5. summerjobswap.com uses SJS-specific plans (different tier than ArtChat)
6. Test every checkout link in 500x700 popup before deploy
7. Preserve .htaccess (HTTPS enforcement, security headers, caching, gzip)
8. Mobile-first responsive — all pages must work on mobile
9. Static HTML only — no frameworks, no build step, fast loading
10. WCAG AA contrast ratios for accessibility
## 5 Redirect Domains (cPanel subdomain redirects, no HTML)
tag.ooo, rooz.live, o-gov.com, masslessmassive.com, eudmusic.com — see REDIRECT_REFERENCE.md
- Cursor: Save as .cursorrules in repo root
- Windsurf: Save as .windsurfrules in repo root
- Zed: Paste into assistant context panel
- Warp: Reference via Warp AI context
- Antigravity: Add as workspace knowledge file
- Any other: Paste into AI chat as system context
